'''Allen Milgrom''' (born [[March 6]], [[1950s#1950|1950]]) is an American [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] book writer, penciller, inker and editor, who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

As a writer he has worked on titles such as [[Wikipedia:Incredible Hulk|''Incredible Hulk'']], [[Wikipedia:Mephisto (comics)|''Mephisto'']] and [[Wikipedia:Amazing Spider-man|''Amazing Spider-man'']]. As a penciller some of the comics he has contributed to include [[Wikipedia:Firestorm (comics)|''Firestorm'']], [[Wikipedia:Avengers (comics)|''Avengers'']], [[Wikipedia:Kitty Pryde and Wolverine|''Kitty Pryde and Wolverine'']] and [[Wikipedia:Secret Wars II|''Secret Wars II'']]. He has been a very prolific inker, working on many books including most of [[Marvel Comics]]' line at one point or another. Series he has worked on include [[Wikipedia:Cable (comics)|''Cable'']], [[Wikipedia:Captain America|''Captain America'']], [[Wikipedia:Generation X (comics)|''Generation X'']], [[Wikipedia:Micronauts|''Micronauts'']], [[Wikipedia:Uncanny X-Men|''Uncanny X-Men'']], [[Wikipedia:Adam Warlock|''Warlock'']], and [[Wikipedia:X-Factor (comics)|''X-Factor'']].

He was editor for Marvel through much of the 1980s, most notably presiding over [[Wikipedia:Epic Comics|''Epic Comics'']] with [[Archie Goodwin]] and editing [[Wikipedia:Marvel Fanfare|''Marvel Fanfare'']] Vol.1 for its full ten year run. He left Marvel in [[2000]].
